title: About Me - Alex Baker MP | Aldershot
meta_description: Find out more about my work, campaigns and how to help make our local area better for everyone.
text_excerpt: About Me - Alex Baker MP | Aldershot >>>>>>>>> (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) >>>>>>>>> End (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) Find me on Facebook 020 7219 4085 Email Me HOME ABOUT NEWS CAMPAIGNS Aldershot and Farnborough Labour’s Missions COMMUNITY SURVEY HELP Contact Useful Links Visit Parliament Privacy Policy ABOUT ME Proud to serve the people of Aldershot and Farnborough. ABOUT ME I am very proud to have been elected to serve the people of Aldershot and Farnborough at the 2024 General Election. I live in Farnborough with my husband and two children. This means that representing this area is personal for me – I want the best for the residents of this constituency. So, I was delighted to be the very first Labour MP, and the first woman, to represent this vibrant and dynamic community. I graduated from the University of Birmingham in 2006 and have worked in various roles for the Co-operative Group and, until my election, I worked on the regeneration of Battersea Power Station, one of the UK’s most successful regeneration schemes. I hope to bring the skills I have picked up during my career in the private sector to revitalise this area. I intend to be the most visible and accessible MP that this constituency has ever had, and you will see me out and about on the doorstep and at community events all year round. I hope that this website gives you a flavour of my work. I would be delighted if you would sign-up to receive my regular updates by adding your contact details in the box below. Information about how to contact me, or to see what I am up to in Parliament and how I vote, is available here . SUBSCRIBE FOR REGULAR UPDATES Stay in the know Subscribe to my email newsletter to keep updated on my news, campaigns and work. Subscribe I agree to the Privacy Policy and to receive email updates. SUBSCRIBE FOR REGULAR UPDATES Stay in the know Subscribe to my email newsletter to keep updated on my news, campaigns and work. Subscribe I agree to the Privacy Policy and to receive email updates. GET IN TOUCH I would love to hear from you about what you think my priorities should be as your MP and what matters most to you. I can also help you with issues such as benefits, housing, immigration, tax, the NHS and education. I aim to respond promptly to everyone, but please remember that I have to prioritise constituents with the most urgent or pressing issues. Campaign or policy issues may take a bit longer. There is also a list of other agencies that may help you here . Please use the contact form to get in touch with me. Please remember to provide as many details as possible, including your name, address and full details of your issue. Don’t forget your postcode! 020 7219 4085 alex.baker.mp@parliament.uk Contact (Footer) Contact Full Name Email Phone/Mobile Address Message I have read & agree to the Privacy Policy (Required) I have read and agree to the policy on Abusive or Unacceptable Behaviour Policy (Required) Sign up to campaign updates Sign me up for email updates with news & campaign developments.
